clauses.aim_at_target.name: Aim Target
clauses.aim_at_nearest_foe.name: Aim Nearest Foe
clauses.if_marked.name: If Marked
clauses.if_marked.tooltip: Follow the true output if the focused actor or tile is marked by you.
clauses.if_occupied.name: If Occupied
clauses.if_occupied.tooltip: Follow the true output if the focused tile contains an actor.
clauses.if_clear.name: If Clear
clauses.if_clear.tooltip: Follow the true output if the focused tile can be occupied.
clauses.mark_them.name: Mark
clauses.mark_them.tooltip: Place your mark on the focused actor or tile.
clauses.spark_them.name: Spark
clauses.spark_them.tooltip: Deal 1 damage to the focused actor. Marked targets take +1 damage.
clauses.raise_stone.name: Raise Stone
clauses.raise_stone.tooltip: Create a temporary blocking stone on the focused clear tile.
clauses.push_them.name: Push
clauses.push_them.tooltip: Push the focused actor away from the caster.
clauses.poison_them.name: Poison
clauses.poison_them.tooltip: Add 3 poison counters to the focused actor. Poison deals 1 damage at the start of that actor's turn, then falls by 1.
clauses.bleed_them.name: Bleed
clauses.bleed_them.tooltip: Add 1 bleed counter to the focused actor. Bleed deals damage equal to its counter when that actor moves.
clauses.venom_burst.name: Venom Burst
clauses.venom_burst.tooltip: Consume 1 poison counter from the focused actor to deal 2 damage.
clauses.rend_bleed.name: Rend
clauses.rend_bleed.tooltip: Consume 1 bleed counter from the focused actor to deal 1 damage and push them.
clauses.remember_them.name: Remember
clauses.remember_them.tooltip: Remember the currently focused actor or tile.
clauses.return_to_remembered.name: Return
clauses.return_to_remembered.tooltip: Focus the remembered actor or tile.
behavior_primitives.stop.name: Stop
behavior_primitives.stop.description: End the current behavior graph and return to the caller.
behavior_primitives.focus_selected_targe: Set spell focus to the selected target tile.
Set spell focus to the nearest living enemy.
Return true if the focused actor or tile is marked by the caster.
behavior_primitives.branch_focus_occupie: Return true if the focused tile contains an actor.
behavior_primitives.branch_focus_clear.d: Return true if the focused tile can be occupied.
behavior_primitives.mark_focus.name: Mark Focus
behavior_primitives.mark_focus.descripti: Place the caster's mark on the focused actor or tile.
behavior_primitives.damage_focus_actor.d: Damage the focused actor by the step amount.
behavior_primitives.raise_stone_focus.de: Create raised stone on the focused clear tile.
behavior_primitives.push_focus.name: Push Focus
behavior_primitives.push_focus.descripti: Push the focused actor away from the caster.
behavior_primitives.remember_focus.name: Remember Focus
behavior_primitives.remember_focus.descr: Store the current focused actor or tile in working memory.
behavior_primitives.return_to_remembered: Restore focus to the remembered actor or tile.
behavior_primitives.branch_enemy_adjacen: Return true if the acting enemy is adjacent to the player.
behavior_primitives.damage_player.name: Damage Player
behavior_primitives.damage_player.descri: Damage the player by the step amount.
behavior_primitives.step_toward_player.d: Move the acting enemy one tile toward the player if possible.
behavior_primitives.increment_counter.de: Increase the acting enemy's local counter by one.
behavior_primitives.branch_counter_at_le: Return true if the acting enemy's local counter is at least the step amount.
behavior_primitives.detonate_owned_tile_: Damage actors on tile marks owned by the acting enemy, then remove those marks.
behavior_primitives.reset_counter.name: Reset Counter
behavior_primitives.reset_counter.descri: Set the acting enemy's local counter to zero.
behavior_primitives.mark_player_tile.des: Place the acting enemy's mark on the player's tile.
behavior_primitives.heal_self_if_adjacen: Heal the acting enemy if it is adjacent to blocking terrain.
behavior_primitives.raise_adjacent_stone: Raise stone on the first clear adjacent tile.
behavior_primitives.branch_event_tile_ra: Return true if the event tile is raised stone.
behavior_primitives.break_event_tile.des: Set the event tile back to ordinary floor.
behavior_primitives.damage_event_actor.d: Damage the actor supplied by the current event.
behavior_primitives.composite_spark.name: Composite Spark
behavior_primitives.composite_spark.desc: Example composite primitive that runs the spark behavior graph.
enemies.glass_hound.name: Glass Hound
enemies.glass_hound.purpose: Chases the player and rewards push/terrain play.
enemies.ash_scribe.name: Ash Scribe
enemies.ash_scribe.purpose: Marks tiles, then punishes standing on marked ground.
enemies.root_saint.name: Root Saint
enemies.root_saint.purpose: Raises terrain and heals near blocking tiles.
enemies.generic.name: Enemy
rules.none.name: No Local Rule
rules.none.description: No special local rule is active.
rules.brittle_stone.name: Brittle Stone
rules.brittle_stone.description: Pushing an actor into raised stone breaks the stone and deals 1 damage.
relics.patient_bell.name: Patient Bell
relics.patient_bell.description: Example relic scaffold. It listens after a spell resolves and routes through a behavior hook.
workings.mark_or_spark.name: Mark or Spark
workings.emergency_wall.name: Emergency Wall
ui.codex.title: Clause Codex
ui.codex.help: Clauses are spell nodes. Add them to the board, then connect output ports into another node's IN port.
ui.codex.flow.condition: Flow: TRUE continues when the condition passes; FALSE continues when it fails.
ui.codex.flow.next: Flow: NEXT continues to the connected clause.
ui.play.hint: Click a tile to target. E toggles the node editor.
ui.graph.input_tooltip: Connect the pending output to this node.
ui.graph.output_tooltip: Click this output, then click another node's IN.
